case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS. MARLON BROWN

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARLON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY IS PRESENT IS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT MARLON BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARLON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 41.05 SERVED MAR-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARLON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, MARLON $4,434.01 PRINCIPAL, $41.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,475.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
